0px; text-decoration-line: none; text-decoration-thickness: auto; text-decoration-style: solid; margin-top: 0px;">Performance &amp; Optimization&nbsp;</h1>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="1330" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="v2OB34sA-GqR4EwWEd6K-56" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;autosize=1;resizable=0;" value="<ol><li style="text-align: left;">Network Performance</li><ol><li style="text-align: left;">Debounce</li><li style="text-align: left;">Cache JS Files</li><li style="text-align: left;">Compress resources (brotli, gzip)</li></ol><li style="text-align: left;">JS Performance</li><ol><li style="text-align: left;">use web-worker (for formula parsing, other heavy task)</li><li style="text-align: left;">writing optimal JS code</li><li style="text-align: left;">Minify code</li><li style="text-align: left;">Load JS async/defer</li><li style="text-align: left;">remove un-used code (tree-shaking)</li></ol><li style="text-align: left;">Rendering Performance</li><ol><li style="text-align: left;">show perception (loader)</li><li style="text-align: left;">load non-critical stuffs later</li><li style="text-align: left;">Direct update store/state from each individual cell and depend only on store for updates not on parent's component state</li><li style="text-align: left;">therefore direct O(1) cell updates instead of re-rendering every cells</li><li style="text-align: left;">prevent un-necessary re-renders using useCallback, useMemo, memo</li><li style="text-align: left;">Virtualisation</li></ol></ol>" vertex="1"> ol.li: User should see a grid of cells
User should be able to write in the cells
User should apply simple formulas on cell to calculate values
User should be able to link another cell into a cell
Cell grid should always give 60ps rendering performance (while scrolling or updating value)

ol.li: use web-worker (for formula parsing, other heavy task)
Direct update store/state from each individual cell and depend only on store for updates not on parent's component state
therefore direct O(1) cell updates instead of re-rendering every cells
prevent un-necessary re-renders using useCallback, useMemo, memo
